TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Cyprus, title = Cyprus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cyprus} }

S.FORM: == Cyprus == Takaray sowal Sayporusu . O itiraay i kahiceraan no Yoropa ato Aciya, i sakawaliay no Sifo'an-Riyar a kanatal, o kakahad no sera ira ko 9,251 km². O kakafana'an to kaira no tamdaw a maro' itini i,miso'edac to 10,000 ko mihecaan,o nalacolan no itiyaay ho i,ira ko Ciyawrutiya(喬伊魯科蒂亞Choirokoitia), ono Fa'elohay-Fakelohan mihecan, tahanini materekay ho noyanan to a kasafaco no loma'. O kaitiraan no Sayporusu itiraay i saicomod nani Sifo'ay-Riyar tayra i Sa'etipan-Aciya, orasaka, nani to'asan ho a miheca makowan no Sitay ,Yasu ,Aykipto ,Posi ,Arapiya-Halifa Hontian kitakit ,Umayie-Hontian kitakit , Winis-Kapolongan Kitakit ato Awsman-Hontian kitakit, hatini to ko ka'adihay no mi'ecoay ato mikowanay to Winis. I 1878 miheca makowan no Ikiris tahira i 1959 miheca ta misiiked nani Ikiris, malamikapotay no Tata'angay-Ikiris-Lekatep. . Yo malaheci to ko pisiiked no Saypuruso, o sakakaay a tamdaw nona kitakit o Kirisiya-Finacadan ato Torki-Finacadan, cilacila malari'ing, tahira i 1974 miheca malingato ko tata'angay a fodfod.1983 miheca yo maro'ay i saka'amisan nona kanatal a teloc no Torki a Saypuruso a tamdaw, ira ko pipadama no Torki-Sifo a lekal sa to mipatireng to "Saypuruso-Torki Kapolongan Kitakit" nikawrira, o Torki aca a kitakit ko mihayay tona milekalay a misiiked a kitakit, orasaka, o Tatapangan Salongoc no Saypuruso ono polong a tamdaw no Saypuruso.roma sato, o so'elinay nikowanan no Kirisiya deng itiraay aca isakatimalan nona kanatal, o kakahad i,mahaop ko 63% no polong a sera nona kanatal. Oniyah a pihai to tireng o Yoropa kako ya sananay, orasaka, i 2004 miheca saka 5 folad saka 1 romi'ad mikapot i Yoropa Lekatep(歐洲聯盟/European Union, EU), malacefang no nona Lekatep. O kakahad no sera 9,251 km². Ngangan no kanatal O ngangan i,no Kirisiya a tilid:"Κυπριακή Δημοκρατία";(SanoLatin:"Kypriakí Demokratía"),簡稱"Κύπρος"； Torki a sowal:"Kıbrıs Cumhuriyeti",簡稱"Kıbrıs": no Conghuwaminkaku:"賽普勒斯"; ono Congko:"塞浦路斯".Pakaynien i sici a mitahidang matatapal ato "Ka'amisay Saypuruso" o " Katimolay Saypuruso"hananay a mitahidang, nikawrira, caay ka pihay ko Torki-Sifo to mitayhyo to polong a Saypuruso a Sakowan, deng o "no Kirisiya-Finacadan a Sakowan no Katimolay Saypuruso" hananay. Rikisi I'ayaw no 8000 miheca iraay to ko niyaro' itini. I'ayaw no 16 sici maforaw a tayni ko Kirisiya a tamdaw. Ikato'asan ho, halo Asu-Hontian Kitakit o Kiti-Kanatal(Kittim) hananay a mitahidang no Yota a tamdaw ko Saypuruso-Kanatal. 'Ayaw no 709~525 miheca matatootoor ko Asu,Aykipto ato Posi a tamdaw mi'eco tona kanatal. 'Ayaw 58 mihecaaan, satapang ko Roma-Hontian Kitakit patireng to Saypuruso-Sakowan itini, 400 ko mihecaan ko pikowan. I 395 miheca, malamikotoday no Paycantin-Hontian kona kanatal.i 1489 miheca mapateko no Winisu-Kapolong kitakit.i 1571 miheca ma'eco no Awsman-Hontian kitakit, i1573 miheca malaheci ko pipecih malasera no Awsman-Hontian kitakit. I 1960 miheca saka 8 folad saka5 romi'ad milekal to pisiiked, patireng to Saypuruso-Kapolongan kitakit. Mapatireng ko Matatekoay-Sifo no Kirisiya tamdaw ato Torki-tamdaw a sifo, tahira i 1963 miheca ira ko tata'angay a fodfod pakayni to pisanga' to Tatapangan-Rikec. 1974 miheca o sofitay no Kirisiya mifelih to sifo no Saypuruso, orasaka, miocoor ko sifo no Torki to sofitay tayra i Saypuruso, oninian ko pilekal no Torki a tomdaw mipatireng to " Saypuruso-Finacadan Kitakit ".tahira to i 1983 miheca miliyaw heca a milekal ko Torki to pipatireng to "Sak'amisay-SaypurusoTorki Kapolongan Kitakit ",nikawrira, caay ka pihay ko hekal a kitakit. I 2004 miheca saka 5 folad saka1 romi'ad oya niaro'an no Kirisiya a tamdaw a etal midemak to Kapolongan-Pitopa a mikapot i Yoropa-Lekatep, malacefang no Yoropa-Lekatep. Sieci Ona kanatal i,makalitosaay o saka'amisan o Saypuruso ono Kirisiya tamdaw a Sakowan, o Sasypuruso-kapolongan kitakit , anoca o Satimolan-Saypuruso hananay a mitahidang, mihayian no kalokitakit, o mikapotay i Linhoko ato Yoropa-Lekatep. O saka'amisay i,o Ka'amisay-Saypuruso hananay, o sakowan no Torki tamadaw, o Ka'amisay-Saypuruso Torki Kapolongan Kitakit , dengan o Torki a kitakit ko mihayiay, i 1990~1995 mihecaan oya paiteked sanany a misiiked a Nasicifan-Niyah Pikowan a kapolongan kitakit ko mihayiyay.nikawrira, cowa ka pihayi ko Tatapangan a kitakit o Yasaypayciyang tona pihayi. Anini o Torki Sifo ko milaheciay a mikowan tona ka'amisay a pecih. I 2004 miheca saka4 folad saka 24 romi'ad ira ko pitomadaw no Tapang no Linheko ci Annan to pidemak to Kapolongan-Pitopa to sakalacecayaw no Saypuruso, talacowa mihayi ko Torki tamdaw to pihalaka no Linheko, nikawrira, ono katimolay a Kirisiya a tamdaw ko 'alomanay, orasaka, mapalahedaw koya demak to sakalacecayaw. I 2004miheca saka 5 folad saka 1 romi'ad, ronok sato ko nikowanan no Kirisiya a pecih mikapot i Yoropa-Lekatep. I 2008 miheca pakaala to singkiw ci Cimitolis-Helistofiyas malacongton,o sa'ayaway o misakyosantoay a Comahaday-Matayalay Lekatep no Sieci, oninian i o tadakakafahekaan, nawhani, o sa'ayaway malacongton ko misakyosantoay itini i Yoropa a kitakit. Ponka ato pitooran O maro'ay i sasifo'an ato sakatimolan o mitooray to Saka'etipay-So'elinay Kyokai mahaop ko 78%, o ka'amisay o mitooray to Islam a Torki-Tmdaw, mahaop ko 18%. I kacanglahan ira ko Limaso-Misatrotrok-Lisin . Tamdaw I 2003 miheca a sa'osi matafesiway to ko 80 'ofad ko tamdaw, o Kirisiya a tamdaw mahaop ko 85.2%, ono Torki a Saypuruso dengan 11.6% ko tamdaw. Nani 2000 miheca misa'aloman a mipacomod to romaay a kitakit a matayalay nai Filipin,Tayko, Slilanka tayni a matayal. Itira to i 2011 miheca ira ko 838,897 ko tamdaw(caka lapot ko Ka'amisay Saypuruso), i 2013 mihecaan a sa'osi to polong nona kanatal latek ira to ko 1,141,166 ko tamdaw.
S.PHON: == ʦjpro~u~us == takaraj so~uwaɾ sajpo~uro~u~uso~u~u . o~u itiraaj i kaħiʦəraan no~u jo~uro~upa ato~u aʦija, i sakawaɾiaj no~u sifo~uʡan-rijar a kanataɾ, o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u səra ira ko~u *,*** km*. o~u kakafanaʡan to~u kaira no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a maro~uʡ itini i,miso~uʡəɬ~ɮaʦ to~u **,*** ko~u miħəʦaan,o~u naɾaʦo~uɾan no~u itijaaj ħo~u i,ira ko~u ʦijawro~u~utija(******ʦħo~uiro~uko~uitia), o~uno~u faʡəɾo~uħaj-fakəɾo~uħan miħəʦan, taħanini matərəkaj ħo~u no~ujanan to~u a kasafaʦo~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ. o~u kaitiraan no~u sajpo~uro~u~uso~u~u itiraaj i saiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ nani sifo~uʡaj-rijar tajra i saʡətipan-aʦija, o~urasaka, nani to~uʡasan ħo~u a miħəʦa mako~uwan no~u sitaj ,jaso~u~u ,ajkipto~u ,po~usi ,arapija-ħaɾifa ħo~untian kitakit ,o~u~umajiə-ħo~untian kitakit , winis-kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit ato~u awsman-ħo~untian kitakit, ħatini to~u ko~u kaʡaɬ~ɮiħaj no~u miʡəʦo~uaj ato~u miko~uwanaj to~u winis. i **** miħəʦa mako~uwan no~u ikiris taħira i **** miħəʦa ta misiikəɬ~ɮ nani ikiris, maɾamikapo~utaj no~u tataʡaŋaj-ikiris-ɾəkatəp. . jo~u maɾaħəʦi to~u ko~u pisiikəɬ~ɮ no~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u, o~u sakakaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~una kitakit o~u kirisija-finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u to~urki-finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʦiɾaʦiɾa maɾariʡiŋ, taħira i **** miħəʦa maɾiŋato~u ko~u tataʡaŋaj a fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ.**** miħəʦa jo~u maro~uʡaj i sakaʡamisan no~una kanataɾ a təɾo~uʦ no~u to~urki a sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, ira ko~u pipaɬ~ɮama no~u to~urki-sifo~u a ɾəkaɾ sa to~u mipatirəŋ to~u "sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-to~urki kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit" nikawrira, o~u to~urki aʦa a kitakit ko~u miħajaj to~una miɾəkaɾaj a misiikəɬ~ɮ a kitakit, o~urasaka, o~u tatapaŋan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u o~uno~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u.ro~uma sato~u, o~u so~uʡəɾinaj niko~uwanan no~u kirisija ɬ~ɮəŋ itiraaj aʦa isakatimaɾan no~una kanataɾ, o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ i,maħao~up ko~u **% no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a səra no~una kanataɾ. o~unijaħ a piħai to~u tirəŋ o~u jo~uro~upa kako~u ja sananaj, o~urasaka, i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mikapo~ut i jo~uro~upa ɾəkatəp(****/əo~u~uro~upəan o~u~unio~un, əo~u~u), maɾaʦəfaŋ no~u no~una ɾəkatəp. o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u səra *,*** km*. ŋaŋan no~u kanataɾ o~u ŋaŋan i,no~u kirisija a tiɾiɬ~ɮ:"******** **********";(sano~uɾatin:"kjpriak* ɬ~ɮəmo~ukrat*a"),**"******"* to~urki a so~uwaɾ:"k*b~b~vr*s ʦo~u~umħo~u~urijəti",**"k*b~b~vr*s": no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uwaminkako~u~u:"****"; o~uno~u ʦo~uŋko~u:"****".pakajniən i siʦi a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ matatapaɾ ato~u "kaʡamisaj sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u" o~u " katimo~uɾaj sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u"ħananaj a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, nikawrira, ʦaaj ka piħaj ko~u to~urki-sifo~u to~u mitajħjo~u to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u a sako~uwan, ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u "no~u kirisija-finaʦaɬ~ɮan a sako~uwan no~u katimo~uɾaj sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u" ħananaj. rikisi iʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦa iraaj to~u ko~u nijaro~uʡ itini. iʡajaw no~u ** siʦi mafo~uraw a tajni ko~u kirisija a tamɬ~ɮaw. ikato~uʡasan ħo~u, ħaɾo~u aso~u~u-ħo~untian kitakit o~u kiti-kanataɾ(kittim) ħananaj a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u jo~uta a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-kanataɾ. ʡajaw no~u ***~*** miħəʦa matato~uo~uto~uo~ur ko~u aso~u~u,ajkipto~u ato~u po~usi a tamɬ~ɮaw miʡəʦo~u to~una kanataɾ. ʡajaw ** miħəʦaaan, satapaŋ ko~u ro~uma-ħo~untian kitakit patirəŋ to~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-sako~uwan itini, *** ko~u miħəʦaan ko~u piko~uwan. i *** miħəʦa, maɾamiko~uto~uɬ~ɮaj no~u pajʦantin-ħo~untian ko~una kanataɾ.i **** miħəʦa mapatəko~u no~u winiso~u~u-kapo~uɾo~uŋ kitakit.i **** miħəʦa maʡəʦo~u no~u awsman-ħo~untian kitakit, i**** miħəʦa maɾaħəʦi ko~u pipəʦiħ maɾasəra no~u awsman-ħo~untian kitakit. i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka* ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾəkaɾ to~u pisiikəɬ~ɮ, patirəŋ to~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit. mapatirəŋ ko~u matatəko~uaj-sifo~u no~u kirisija tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u to~urki-tamɬ~ɮaw a sifo~u, taħira i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u tataʡaŋaj a fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ pakajni to~u pisaŋaʡ to~u tatapaŋan-rikəʦ. **** miħəʦa o~u so~ufitaj no~u kirisija mifəɾiħ to~u sifo~u no~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u, o~urasaka, mio~uʦo~uo~ur ko~u sifo~u no~u to~urki to~u so~ufitaj tajra i sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u, o~uninian ko~u piɾəkaɾ no~u to~urki a to~umɬ~ɮaw mipatirəŋ to~u " sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-finaʦaɬ~ɮan kitakit ".taħira to~u i **** miħəʦa miɾijaw ħəʦa a miɾəkaɾ ko~u to~urki to~u pipatirəŋ to~u "sakʡamisaj-sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~uto~urki kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit ",nikawrira, ʦaaj ka piħaj ko~u ħəkaɾ a kitakit. i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka* ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~uja niaro~uʡan no~u kirisija a tamɬ~ɮaw a ətaɾ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan-pito~upa a mikapo~ut i jo~uro~upa-ɾəkatəp, maɾaʦəfaŋ no~u jo~uro~upa-ɾəkatəp. siəʦi o~una kanataɾ i,makaɾito~usaaj o~u sakaʡamisan o~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u o~uno~u kirisija tamɬ~ɮaw a sako~uwan, o~u sasjpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit , ano~uʦa o~u satimo~uɾan-sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u ħananaj a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, miħajian no~u kaɾo~ukitakit, o~u mikapo~utaj i ɾinħo~uko~u ato~u jo~uro~upa-ɾəkatəp. o~u sakaʡamisaj i,o~u kaʡamisaj-sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u ħananaj, o~u sako~uwan no~u to~urki tamaɬ~ɮaw, o~u kaʡamisaj-sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u to~urki kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit , ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u to~urki a kitakit ko~u miħajiaj, i ****~**** miħəʦaan o~uja paitəkəɬ~ɮ sananj a misiikəɬ~ɮ a nasiʦifan-nijaħ piko~uwan a kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit ko~u miħajijaj.nikawrira, ʦo~uwa ka piħaji ko~u tatapaŋan a kitakit o~u jasajpajʦijaŋ to~una piħaji. anini o~u to~urki sifo~u ko~u miɾaħəʦiaj a miko~uwan to~una kaʡamisaj a pəʦiħ. i **** miħəʦa saka* fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u pito~umaɬ~ɮaw no~u tapaŋ no~u ɾinħəko~u ʦi annan to~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan-pito~upa to~u sakaɾaʦəʦajaw no~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u, taɾaʦo~uwa miħaji ko~u to~urki tamɬ~ɮaw to~u piħaɾaka no~u ɾinħəko~u, nikawrira, o~uno~u katimo~uɾaj a kirisija a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, o~urasaka, mapaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~uja ɬ~ɮəmak to~u sakaɾaʦəʦajaw. i ****miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ro~uno~uk sato~u ko~u niko~uwanan no~u kirisija a pəʦiħ mikapo~ut i jo~uro~upa-ɾəkatəp. i **** miħəʦa pakaaɾa to~u siŋkiw ʦi ʦimito~uɾis-ħəɾisto~ufijas maɾaʦo~uŋto~un,o~u saʡajawaj o~u misakjo~usanto~uaj a ʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮaj-matajaɾaj ɾəkatəp no~u siəʦi, o~uninian i o~u taɬ~ɮakakafaħəkaan, nawħani, o~u saʡajawaj maɾaʦo~uŋto~un ko~u misakjo~usanto~uaj itini i jo~uro~upa a kitakit. po~unka ato~u pito~uo~uran o~u maro~uʡaj i sasifo~uʡan ato~u sakatimo~uɾan o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u sakaʡətipaj-so~uʡəɾinaj kjo~ukai maħao~up ko~u **%, o~u kaʡamisaj o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u isɾam a to~urki-tmɬ~ɮaw, maħao~up ko~u **%. i kaʦaŋɾaħan ira ko~u ɾimaso~u-misatro~utro~uk-ɾisin . tamɬ~ɮaw i **** miħəʦa a saʡo~usi matafəsiwaj to~u ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u kirisija a tamɬ~ɮaw maħao~up ko~u **.*%, o~uno~u to~urki a sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u ɬ~ɮəŋan **.*% ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. nani **** miħəʦa misaʡaɾo~uman a mipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ro~umaaj a kitakit a matajaɾaj nai fiɾipin,tajko~u, sɾiɾanka tajni a matajaɾ. itira to~u i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u ***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw(ʦaka ɾapo~ut ko~u kaʡamisaj sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u), i **** miħəʦaan a saʡo~usi to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~una kanataɾ ɾatək ira to~u ko~u *,***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.FORM: == Cyprus == Takaray sowal Sayporusu . O itiraay i kahiceraan no Yoropa ato Aciya, i sakawaliay no Sifo'an-Riyar a kanatal, o kakahad no sera ira ko 9,251 km². O kakafana'an to kaira no tamdaw a maro' itini i,miso'edac to 10,000 ko mihecaan,o nalacolan no itiyaay ho i,ira ko Ciyawrutiya(喬伊魯科蒂亞Choirokoitia), ono Fa'elohay-Fakelohan mihecan, tahanini materekay ho noyanan to a kasafaco no loma'. O kaitiraan no Sayporusu itiraay i saicomod nani Sifo'ay-Riyar tayra i Sa'etipan-Aciya, orasaka, nani to'asan ho a miheca makowan no Sitay ,Yasu ,Aykipto ,Posi ,Arapiya-Halifa Hontian kitakit ,Umayie-Hontian kitakit , Winis-Kapolongan Kitakit ato Awsman-Hontian kitakit, hatini to ko ka'adihay no mi'ecoay ato mikowanay to Winis. I 1878 miheca makowan no Ikiris tahira i 1959 miheca ta misiiked nani Ikiris, malamikapotay no Tata'angay-Ikiris-Lekatep. . Yo malaheci to ko pisiiked no Saypuruso, o sakakaay a tamdaw nona kitakit o Kirisiya-Finacadan ato Torki-Finacadan, cilacila malari'ing, tahira i 1974 miheca malingato ko tata'angay a fodfod.1983 miheca yo maro'ay i saka'amisan nona kanatal a teloc no Torki a Saypuruso a tamdaw, ira ko pipadama no Torki-Sifo a lekal sa to mipatireng to "Saypuruso-Torki Kapolongan Kitakit" nikawrira, o Torki aca a kitakit ko mihayay tona milekalay a misiiked a kitakit, orasaka, o Tatapangan Salongoc no Saypuruso ono polong a tamdaw no Saypuruso.roma sato, o so'elinay nikowanan no Kirisiya deng itiraay aca isakatimalan nona kanatal, o kakahad i,mahaop ko 63% no polong a sera nona kanatal. Oniyah a pihai to tireng o Yoropa kako ya sananay, orasaka, i 2004 miheca saka 5 folad saka 1 romi'ad mikapot i Yoropa Lekatep(歐洲聯盟/European Union, EU), malacefang no nona Lekatep. O kakahad no sera 9,251 km². Ngangan no kanatal O ngangan i,no Kirisiya a tilid:"Κυπριακή Δημοκρατία";(SanoLatin:"Kypriakí Demokratía"),簡稱"Κύπρος"； Torki a sowal:"Kıbrıs Cumhuriyeti",簡稱"Kıbrıs": no Conghuwaminkaku:"賽普勒斯"; ono Congko:"塞浦路斯".Pakaynien i sici a mitahidang matatapal ato "Ka'amisay Saypuruso" o " Katimolay Saypuruso"hananay a mitahidang, nikawrira, caay ka pihay ko Torki-Sifo to mitayhyo to polong a Saypuruso a Sakowan, deng o "no Kirisiya-Finacadan a Sakowan no Katimolay Saypuruso" hananay. Rikisi I'ayaw no 8000 miheca iraay to ko niyaro' itini. I'ayaw no 16 sici maforaw a tayni ko Kirisiya a tamdaw. Ikato'asan ho, halo Asu-Hontian Kitakit o Kiti-Kanatal(Kittim) hananay a mitahidang no Yota a tamdaw ko Saypuruso-Kanatal. 'Ayaw no 709~525 miheca matatootoor ko Asu,Aykipto ato Posi a tamdaw mi'eco tona kanatal. 'Ayaw 58 mihecaaan, satapang ko Roma-Hontian Kitakit patireng to Saypuruso-Sakowan itini, 400 ko mihecaan ko pikowan. I 395 miheca, malamikotoday no Paycantin-Hontian kona kanatal.i 1489 miheca mapateko no Winisu-Kapolong kitakit.i 1571 miheca ma'eco no Awsman-Hontian kitakit, i1573 miheca malaheci ko pipecih malasera no Awsman-Hontian kitakit. I 1960 miheca saka 8 folad saka5 romi'ad milekal to pisiiked, patireng to Saypuruso-Kapolongan kitakit. Mapatireng ko Matatekoay-Sifo no Kirisiya tamdaw ato Torki-tamdaw a sifo, tahira i 1963 miheca ira ko tata'angay a fodfod pakayni to pisanga' to Tatapangan-Rikec. 1974 miheca o sofitay no Kirisiya mifelih to sifo no Saypuruso, orasaka, miocoor ko sifo no Torki to sofitay tayra i Saypuruso, oninian ko pilekal no Torki a tomdaw mipatireng to " Saypuruso-Finacadan Kitakit ".tahira to i 1983 miheca miliyaw heca a milekal ko Torki to pipatireng to "Sak'amisay-SaypurusoTorki Kapolongan Kitakit ",nikawrira, caay ka pihay ko hekal a kitakit. I 2004 miheca saka 5 folad saka1 romi'ad oya niaro'an no Kirisiya a tamdaw a etal midemak to Kapolongan-Pitopa a mikapot i Yoropa-Lekatep, malacefang no Yoropa-Lekatep. Sieci Ona kanatal i,makalitosaay o saka'amisan o Saypuruso ono Kirisiya tamdaw a Sakowan, o Sasypuruso-kapolongan kitakit , anoca o Satimolan-Saypuruso hananay a mitahidang, mihayian no kalokitakit, o mikapotay i Linhoko ato Yoropa-Lekatep. O saka'amisay i,o Ka'amisay-Saypuruso hananay, o sakowan no Torki tamadaw, o Ka'amisay-Saypuruso Torki Kapolongan Kitakit , dengan o Torki a kitakit ko mihayiay, i 1990~1995 mihecaan oya paiteked sanany a misiiked a Nasicifan-Niyah Pikowan a kapolongan kitakit ko mihayiyay.nikawrira, cowa ka pihayi ko Tatapangan a kitakit o Yasaypayciyang tona pihayi. Anini o Torki Sifo ko milaheciay a mikowan tona ka'amisay a pecih. I 2004 miheca saka4 folad saka 24 romi'ad ira ko pitomadaw no Tapang no Linheko ci Annan to pidemak to Kapolongan-Pitopa to sakalacecayaw no Saypuruso, talacowa mihayi ko Torki tamdaw to pihalaka no Linheko, nikawrira, ono katimolay a Kirisiya a tamdaw ko 'alomanay, orasaka, mapalahedaw koya demak to sakalacecayaw. I 2004miheca saka 5 folad saka 1 romi'ad, ronok sato ko nikowanan no Kirisiya a pecih mikapot i Yoropa-Lekatep. I 2008 miheca pakaala to singkiw ci Cimitolis-Helistofiyas malacongton,o sa'ayaway o misakyosantoay a Comahaday-Matayalay Lekatep no Sieci, oninian i o tadakakafahekaan, nawhani, o sa'ayaway malacongton ko misakyosantoay itini i Yoropa a kitakit. Ponka ato pitooran O maro'ay i sasifo'an ato sakatimolan o mitooray to Saka'etipay-So'elinay Kyokai mahaop ko 78%, o ka'amisay o mitooray to Islam a Torki-Tmdaw, mahaop ko 18%. I kacanglahan ira ko Limaso-Misatrotrok-Lisin . Tamdaw I 2003 miheca a sa'osi matafesiway to ko 80 'ofad ko tamdaw, o Kirisiya a tamdaw mahaop ko 85.2%, ono Torki a Saypuruso dengan 11.6% ko tamdaw. Nani 2000 miheca misa'aloman a mipacomod to romaay a kitakit a matayalay nai Filipin,Tayko, Slilanka tayni a matayal. Itira to i 2011 miheca ira ko 838,897 ko tamdaw(caka lapot ko Ka'amisay Saypuruso), i 2013 mihecaan a sa'osi to polong nona kanatal latek ira to ko 1,141,166 ko tamdaw.
S.PHON: == ʦjpro~u~us == takaraj so~uwaɾ sajpo~uro~u~uso~u~u . o~u itiraaj i kaħiʦəraan no~u jo~uro~upa ato~u aʦija, i sakawaɾiaj no~u sifo~uʡan-rijar a kanataɾ, o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u səra ira ko~u *,*** km*. o~u kakafanaʡan to~u kaira no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a maro~uʡ itini i,miso~uʡəɬ~ɮaʦ to~u **,*** ko~u miħəʦaan,o~u naɾaʦo~uɾan no~u itijaaj ħo~u i,ira ko~u ʦijawro~u~utija(******ʦħo~uiro~uko~uitia), o~uno~u faʡəɾo~uħaj-fakəɾo~uħan miħəʦan, taħanini matərəkaj ħo~u no~ujanan to~u a kasafaʦo~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ. o~u kaitiraan no~u sajpo~uro~u~uso~u~u itiraaj i saiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ nani sifo~uʡaj-rijar tajra i saʡətipan-aʦija, o~urasaka, nani to~uʡasan ħo~u a miħəʦa mako~uwan no~u sitaj ,jaso~u~u ,ajkipto~u ,po~usi ,arapija-ħaɾifa ħo~untian kitakit ,o~u~umajiə-ħo~untian kitakit , winis-kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit ato~u awsman-ħo~untian kitakit, ħatini to~u ko~u kaʡaɬ~ɮiħaj no~u miʡəʦo~uaj ato~u miko~uwanaj to~u winis. i **** miħəʦa mako~uwan no~u ikiris taħira i **** miħəʦa ta misiikəɬ~ɮ nani ikiris, maɾamikapo~utaj no~u tataʡaŋaj-ikiris-ɾəkatəp. . jo~u maɾaħəʦi to~u ko~u pisiikəɬ~ɮ no~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u, o~u sakakaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~una kitakit o~u kirisija-finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u to~urki-finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʦiɾaʦiɾa maɾariʡiŋ, taħira i **** miħəʦa maɾiŋato~u ko~u tataʡaŋaj a fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ.**** miħəʦa jo~u maro~uʡaj i sakaʡamisan no~una kanataɾ a təɾo~uʦ no~u to~urki a sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, ira ko~u pipaɬ~ɮama no~u to~urki-sifo~u a ɾəkaɾ sa to~u mipatirəŋ to~u "sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-to~urki kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit" nikawrira, o~u to~urki aʦa a kitakit ko~u miħajaj to~una miɾəkaɾaj a misiikəɬ~ɮ a kitakit, o~urasaka, o~u tatapaŋan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u o~uno~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u.ro~uma sato~u, o~u so~uʡəɾinaj niko~uwanan no~u kirisija ɬ~ɮəŋ itiraaj aʦa isakatimaɾan no~una kanataɾ, o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ i,maħao~up ko~u **% no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a səra no~una kanataɾ. o~unijaħ a piħai to~u tirəŋ o~u jo~uro~upa kako~u ja sananaj, o~urasaka, i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mikapo~ut i jo~uro~upa ɾəkatəp(****/əo~u~uro~upəan o~u~unio~un, əo~u~u), maɾaʦəfaŋ no~u no~una ɾəkatəp. o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u səra *,*** km*. ŋaŋan no~u kanataɾ o~u ŋaŋan i,no~u kirisija a tiɾiɬ~ɮ:"******** **********";(sano~uɾatin:"kjpriak* ɬ~ɮəmo~ukrat*a"),**"******"* to~urki a so~uwaɾ:"k*b~b~vr*s ʦo~u~umħo~u~urijəti",**"k*b~b~vr*s": no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uwaminkako~u~u:"****"; o~uno~u ʦo~uŋko~u:"****".pakajniən i siʦi a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ matatapaɾ ato~u "kaʡamisaj sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u" o~u " katimo~uɾaj sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u"ħananaj a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, nikawrira, ʦaaj ka piħaj ko~u to~urki-sifo~u to~u mitajħjo~u to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u a sako~uwan, ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u "no~u kirisija-finaʦaɬ~ɮan a sako~uwan no~u katimo~uɾaj sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u" ħananaj. rikisi iʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦa iraaj to~u ko~u nijaro~uʡ itini. iʡajaw no~u ** siʦi mafo~uraw a tajni ko~u kirisija a tamɬ~ɮaw. ikato~uʡasan ħo~u, ħaɾo~u aso~u~u-ħo~untian kitakit o~u kiti-kanataɾ(kittim) ħananaj a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u jo~uta a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-kanataɾ. ʡajaw no~u ***~*** miħəʦa matato~uo~uto~uo~ur ko~u aso~u~u,ajkipto~u ato~u po~usi a tamɬ~ɮaw miʡəʦo~u to~una kanataɾ. ʡajaw ** miħəʦaaan, satapaŋ ko~u ro~uma-ħo~untian kitakit patirəŋ to~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-sako~uwan itini, *** ko~u miħəʦaan ko~u piko~uwan. i *** miħəʦa, maɾamiko~uto~uɬ~ɮaj no~u pajʦantin-ħo~untian ko~una kanataɾ.i **** miħəʦa mapatəko~u no~u winiso~u~u-kapo~uɾo~uŋ kitakit.i **** miħəʦa maʡəʦo~u no~u awsman-ħo~untian kitakit, i**** miħəʦa maɾaħəʦi ko~u pipəʦiħ maɾasəra no~u awsman-ħo~untian kitakit. i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka* ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾəkaɾ to~u pisiikəɬ~ɮ, patirəŋ to~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit. mapatirəŋ ko~u matatəko~uaj-sifo~u no~u kirisija tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u to~urki-tamɬ~ɮaw a sifo~u, taħira i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u tataʡaŋaj a fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ pakajni to~u pisaŋaʡ to~u tatapaŋan-rikəʦ. **** miħəʦa o~u so~ufitaj no~u kirisija mifəɾiħ to~u sifo~u no~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u, o~urasaka, mio~uʦo~uo~ur ko~u sifo~u no~u to~urki to~u so~ufitaj tajra i sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u, o~uninian ko~u piɾəkaɾ no~u to~urki a to~umɬ~ɮaw mipatirəŋ to~u " sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-finaʦaɬ~ɮan kitakit ".taħira to~u i **** miħəʦa miɾijaw ħəʦa a miɾəkaɾ ko~u to~urki to~u pipatirəŋ to~u "sakʡamisaj-sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~uto~urki kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit ",nikawrira, ʦaaj ka piħaj ko~u ħəkaɾ a kitakit. i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka* ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~uja niaro~uʡan no~u kirisija a tamɬ~ɮaw a ətaɾ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan-pito~upa a mikapo~ut i jo~uro~upa-ɾəkatəp, maɾaʦəfaŋ no~u jo~uro~upa-ɾəkatəp. siəʦi o~una kanataɾ i,makaɾito~usaaj o~u sakaʡamisan o~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u o~uno~u kirisija tamɬ~ɮaw a sako~uwan, o~u sasjpo~u~uro~u~uso~u-kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit , ano~uʦa o~u satimo~uɾan-sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u ħananaj a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, miħajian no~u kaɾo~ukitakit, o~u mikapo~utaj i ɾinħo~uko~u ato~u jo~uro~upa-ɾəkatəp. o~u sakaʡamisaj i,o~u kaʡamisaj-sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u ħananaj, o~u sako~uwan no~u to~urki tamaɬ~ɮaw, o~u kaʡamisaj-sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u to~urki kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit , ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u to~urki a kitakit ko~u miħajiaj, i ****~**** miħəʦaan o~uja paitəkəɬ~ɮ sananj a misiikəɬ~ɮ a nasiʦifan-nijaħ piko~uwan a kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit ko~u miħajijaj.nikawrira, ʦo~uwa ka piħaji ko~u tatapaŋan a kitakit o~u jasajpajʦijaŋ to~una piħaji. anini o~u to~urki sifo~u ko~u miɾaħəʦiaj a miko~uwan to~una kaʡamisaj a pəʦiħ. i **** miħəʦa saka* fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u pito~umaɬ~ɮaw no~u tapaŋ no~u ɾinħəko~u ʦi annan to~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan-pito~upa to~u sakaɾaʦəʦajaw no~u sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u, taɾaʦo~uwa miħaji ko~u to~urki tamɬ~ɮaw to~u piħaɾaka no~u ɾinħəko~u, nikawrira, o~uno~u katimo~uɾaj a kirisija a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, o~urasaka, mapaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~uja ɬ~ɮəmak to~u sakaɾaʦəʦajaw. i ****miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ro~uno~uk sato~u ko~u niko~uwanan no~u kirisija a pəʦiħ mikapo~ut i jo~uro~upa-ɾəkatəp. i **** miħəʦa pakaaɾa to~u siŋkiw ʦi ʦimito~uɾis-ħəɾisto~ufijas maɾaʦo~uŋto~un,o~u saʡajawaj o~u misakjo~usanto~uaj a ʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮaj-matajaɾaj ɾəkatəp no~u siəʦi, o~uninian i o~u taɬ~ɮakakafaħəkaan, nawħani, o~u saʡajawaj maɾaʦo~uŋto~un ko~u misakjo~usanto~uaj itini i jo~uro~upa a kitakit. po~unka ato~u pito~uo~uran o~u maro~uʡaj i sasifo~uʡan ato~u sakatimo~uɾan o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u sakaʡətipaj-so~uʡəɾinaj kjo~ukai maħao~up ko~u **%, o~u kaʡamisaj o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u isɾam a to~urki-tmɬ~ɮaw, maħao~up ko~u **%. i kaʦaŋɾaħan ira ko~u ɾimaso~u-misatro~utro~uk-ɾisin . tamɬ~ɮaw i **** miħəʦa a saʡo~usi matafəsiwaj to~u ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u kirisija a tamɬ~ɮaw maħao~up ko~u **.*%, o~uno~u to~urki a sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u ɬ~ɮəŋan **.*% ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. nani **** miħəʦa misaʡaɾo~uman a mipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ro~umaaj a kitakit a matajaɾaj nai fiɾipin,tajko~u, sɾiɾanka tajni a matajaɾ. itira to~u i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u ***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw(ʦaka ɾapo~ut ko~u kaʡamisaj sajpo~u~uro~u~uso~u), i **** miħəʦaan a saʡo~usi to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~una kanataɾ ɾatək ira to~u ko~u *,***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
